plugins.name: grok
plugins.description: Grok as a peer implementer for Codex / ChatGPT: default integration=direct lands consented live-tree edits; auto/review are opt-in worktrees; ACP is the default peer channel (runMode direct is a separate installed-home security posture). Review, reason, verify, continue-run, and verified handoff included. See plugin/references/integration-modes.md. Not affiliated with xAI.
